personas.name: The Quiet Loyalist
personas.summary: Long-tenured Chanel client who considers the brand her default uniform. Buys seasonally without needing persuasion — she's looking for something to confirm her existing taste, not discover something new.
personas.shopping_behavior: Repurchases classic silhouettes in new seasonal colors. Has a preferred SA and prefers in-store. Rarely influenced by social media.
personas.trend_receptivity: Classic tweed reinterpretations, subtle seasonal updates to core silhouettes, heritage references, quality-focused narratives
personas.avoid: Anything too trend-forward, collaborations that feel off-brand, streetwear crossovers, bold logo moments

personas.name: The Modern Parisienne
personas.summary: High-earning creative professional who treats Chanel as her power dressing choice. Values the brand's cultural cachet as much as its craft. Follows fashion with genuine knowledge.
personas.shopping_behavior: Selectively buys statement pieces that mix with her wardrobe. Researches online but prefers in-store experience. Responsive to runway references and KOL styling.
personas.trend_receptivity: Contemporary silhouettes with Chanel codes, styling versatility, cultural references, seasonal it-pieces
personas.avoid: Overly conservative or matronly styling, anything that reads as predictable or expected

personas.name: The Investment Dresser
personas.summary: Financially savvy professional who views Chanel as investment dressing. Researches resale value and long-term wearability alongside aesthetic appeal.
personas.shopping_behavior: Deliberate buyer who takes time before committing. Asks about craftsmanship and care. Highly researched — knows current and historic pricing.
personas.trend_receptivity: Classic pieces with strong resale value, versatile staples, craft and quality narratives, pieces with seasonal relevance that won't date
personas.avoid: Highly trend-specific pieces, seasonal novelties, anything with poor resale track record

personas.name: The Social Curator
personas.summary: XHS-native luxury consumer who enters Chanel for its cultural and social currency. Brand image and content-worthiness matter as much as the product itself.
personas.shopping_behavior: Heavily influenced by XHS and WeChat moments. Often researches specific pieces seen on KOLs. Responsive to campaign imagery and brand storytelling.
personas.trend_receptivity: Highly visual, content-friendly pieces, campaign-featured styles, KOL-worn items, seasonal drops with social buzz
personas.avoid: Understated pieces with no immediate social signaling, niche or archive references without cultural traction
